data.title: Analyst Slashes Altcoin Bet By 50% As Fed Tightening Rattles Crypto Market
data.description:
The crypto market is flashing warning signs. Bitcoin hovers around $87,428. 99, down 19. 7% from its $109,000 peak, while altcoins bleed even harder—some shedding 30% in weeks
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/29/analyst-slashes-altcoin-bet-by-50-as-fed-tightening-rattles-crypto-market/

data.title: SEC Engages Wintermute on Crypto Regulation Solutions
data.description:
SEC meets Wintermute to discuss crypto regulatory issues, liquidity, and market structure on March 28, 2025.
source: https://coincu.com/329323-sec-wintermute-crypto-regulation-talks

data.title: Trader Says Newly Launched Altcoin About To ‘Open the Gates’ to 70% Rally, Updates Outlook on XRP and SUI
data.description:
Cryptocurrency trader and analyst Ali Martinez is leaning bullish on an altcoin that’s less than two months old while unveiling his forecast for XRP (XRP) and Sui (SUI).
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/29/trader-says-newly-launched-altcoin-about-to-open-the-gates-to-70-rally-updates-outlook-on-xrp-and-sui/

data.title: A whale who was long 4,159 ETH on leverage has bought it back at $1,875, with a loss of $3,383
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an on-chain analyst, a whale who had leveraged long 4,159 ETH at an average price of $1,876 17 hours ago bought them all back at $1,875 3 hours ago, resulting in a loss of $3,383.

data.title: Trump to Host El Salvador's Bukele for Bitcoin Talks at White House
data.description:
U. S. President Trump to meet El Salvador's Bukele at White House for Bitcoin discussions. Impact significant on cryptocurrency market.
source: https://coincu.com/329321-trump-bukele-bitcoin-talks

data.title: A certain whale is suspected to have reduced its holdings of 150 billion PEPE 6 hours ago, and the total profit of a single coin exceeded 10.324 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an on-chain analyst, the whale who opened a position at the low point of PEPE on the first day of its launch is suspected of reducing its position by 150 billion PEPE (US$1.14 million) 6 hours ago. Its cost was as low as US$0.000000001421, and the total profit of a single coin exceeded US$10.324 million. This smart money spent 1.04 ETH (US$2,186) on 1.53 trillion tokens through two addresses on April 15, 2023. After this sale, it still holds 493.7 billion tokens, with a return rate of up to 4,721 times.

data.title: XRP Price Hits $21K on Live TV: A Price Glitch Goes Viral
data.description:
This sparked confusion and controversy in the crypto community. The price spike was part of a broader technical issue that also affected the values of other cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana. …
source: https://coinpedia.org/crypto-live-news/xrp-price-hits-21k-on-live-tv-a-price-glitch-goes-viral/

data.title: BONK Meme Coin Amid Worst Performers
data.description:
Bonk (BONK), major community meme coin, is in red today, close to losing place in top 100
source: https://u.today/bonk-meme-coin-amid-worst-performers

data.title: A whale bought 3,195 ETH an hour ago, equivalent to $5.97 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale bought 3,195 ETH 1 hour ago, equivalent to US$5.97 million, with an average price of US$1,868. Since March 26, this whale has purchased 29,341 ETH (US$58.18 million) at an average price of US$1,983.
